- [ ] ### HOME PAGE

- [ ] ### BECOME 100 HANDY PRO

- [ ] CITY PAGES  
       - [ ] FIND US IN THESE CITIES  
       - [ ] SERVICES BY CITY

- [ ] ### ALL SERVICES

      - [ ] ### SUB-SERVICE PAGE (E.G., ASSEMBLY)

- [ ] ### 100 HANDY STAR

- [ ] ### ABOUT US

- [ ] ### CAREERS

- [ ] ### PRESS

- [ ] ### BLOG

      ###

_NOTES:_

- This document is comments for layouts only and applies to all pages with the same design, e.g., comments for ALL SERVICES PAGES apply to ALL services pages, **not just** for the link provided.
- Titles across all pages need to be capitalised properly

#### ALL PAGES

- All buttons need to be designed the same across the website.
- ‘Book Now’ buttons need to be linked to the booking page
- Change Become a Tasker to Become a Pro  
  ![][image1]
- Anywhere it says ‘Tasker’ it should say ‘100 Handy Pro’
- Please make the hero section dimensions the same as All Services pages

![][image2]

#### FOOTER

- Change the slug of Become a 100Handy Pro to ‘become-100-handy-pro’
- Change the slug of Rated Pros to ‘100-handy-star’ and the text to 100 Handy Stars rather than Rated Pros

#### HOME PAGE

![][image3]

1. The icons need to be bigger.
2. Consistent spacing between the icons
3. When we click on See All Services (Not all services are there)
4. The section below the list of icons for main services doesn’t change (below section screenshot):
   1. Mounting:
      1.
   2. Home Repairs
   3. Plumbing
   4. Electrical
   5. Cleaning
   6. Moving
   7. Outdoor Help (needs to be capital ‘H’ in Help)

![][image4]

5. Popular Services:
   - List:
     - Furniture Assembly
     - TV Mounting
     - Install Curtains and Blinds
     - Plumbing
     - Light Installation
     - Deep Cleaning
     - Gardening
     - Gutter Cleaning

       ![][image5]

       6\. Capitalisation is wrong: See What Happy Customers are Saying About 100 Handy

   ![][image6]  
    \- Get Help Today:
   - ‘Hang’ not ‘Hand’ Pictures
   - All links need to be checked in the section

**\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**

#### BECOME A 100 HANDY PRO: [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/become-tasker](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/become-tasker)

- [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/become-tasker](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/become-tasker) \- URL needs to be ‘become a handy’
- Add icons to the section below and centre everything

![][image7]

- Make this section:

![][image8]

In this style and make it x5 and leave it as Getting Started is Simple (capital S)  
![][image9]

- Remove:

![][image10]

##### CITY PAGES HERO (ref: [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/locations/manchester](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/locations/manchester))

- Needs text at the top of the image:
  - Button (Book Now)
- Icons: use the icons for relevant to each service, as provided

##### FIND US IN THESE CITIES \- [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/services-by-city](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/services-by-city)

- None of the links on the page are working, i.e., getting 404 message from each link
- These cities are missing:

![][image11]

##### SERVICES BY CITY \- [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/locations/manchester/furniture-assembly](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/locations/manchester/furniture-assembly)

- Hero section: use service icon on hero image
- Remove feedback section completely
- ‘How it works’ needs to go below the ‘Your Satisfaction Guaranteed’ section
- Remove second feedback section
- Add this section below ‘How It Works’ section:
  - Add a ‘Book Now’ button below the text as a CTA

![][image12]

- Lastly \- FAQs

#### ALL SERVICES PAGE: [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/services](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/services)

- Hero text: Use a white boxed background, as per sub-services pages (just needs to be current title and sub-title \- no other text to be added please)

![][image13]

- Update images for each service. Each service needs to have the right image:

![][image14]

- Anywhere it says ‘See more ‘x’ service’ \- remove
- Outdoor help:
  - Landscaping icon \- change, as currently different to the rest
-

#### SUB-SERVICES PAGES: [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/services/tv-wall-mounting/tv-wall-mounting](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/services/tv-wall-mounting/tv-wall-mounting)

- Hero image needs to be full-width to fill up the hero section completely \- no borders.
- How It Works \- remove the images and just leave the numbers

####

#### 100 HANDY STAR: [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/elite-taskers](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/elite-taskers)

- Our top-rated ' 100 Handy Pros’ rather than just ‘Handys’
- Change the background to orange with white text and white icon.

![][image15]  
Same colour as the button

![][image16]

- Anywhere it says ‘Star Handies’ it needs to say ‘100 Handy Stars’

#### ABOUT US: https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/about-us

- Hero image needs to change. OxD PR to send

- We Live By Our Values \- please make into a carousel

![][image17]

#### PRESS: [https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/press](https://100handy-client-web.vercel.app/press)

- Media Resources: remove images and just have an orange box with white text as links

- Please add hero section

- Phone numbers from all countries need to be included.
